prompt: Build a Python class for a simple todo list with add, remove, and list methods

requirements: Create a Python class with add, remove, and list methods
execution_steps: Define the TodoList class with attributes for tasks and methods to add, remove, and list tasks
Implement the add method to append new tasks to the list
Implement the remove method to delete tasks from the list
Implement the list method to display all tasks in the list

implementation.description: A Python class for a simple todo list with add, remove, and list methods
completed_steps: Define the TodoList class with attributes for tasks and methods to add, remove, and list tasks
Implement the add method to append new tasks to the list
Implement the remove method to delete tasks from the list
Implement the list method to display all tasks in the list

issues.description: The remove method does not handle cases where the task is not found in the list.
The list method returns a reference to the internal list, which may change if the TodoList object is modified.

recommendations: Implement the remove method to handle cases where the task is not found in the list.
Consider returning a copy of the internal list instead of a reference to improve safety and usability.
